languages.text: "Постойте, вы меня не поняли! Я вовсе не служу Инквизиции!"
"Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"
languages.original_text: "Постойте, вы меня не поняли! Я вовсе не служу Инквизиции!"

traits.locale_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"
"Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"
"Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

languages.text: “等等，你误会了！我根本不是审判庭的人！”
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: “等等，你误会了！我根本不是审判庭的人！”

languages.text: « Attendez, c'est un malentendu ! Je ne suis pas au service de l'Inquisition, bien au contraire ! »
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: « Attendez, c'est un malentendu ! Je ne suis pas au service de l'Inquisition, bien au contraire ! »

languages.text: "Dur, yanlış anladın! Engizisyon'a hizmet ettiğim yok!"
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: "Dur, yanlış anladın! Engizisyon'a hizmet ettiğim yok!"

languages.text: «¡Espere, me ha entendido mal! ¡En absoluto sirvo a la Inquisición!».
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Espere, me ha entendido mal! ¡En absoluto sirvo a la Inquisición!».

languages.text: "Wartet, Ihr habt mich falsch verstanden. Ich diene nicht der Inquisition."
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: "Wartet, Ihr habt mich falsch verstanden. Ich diene nicht der Inquisition."

languages.text: 「待ってください、あなたは誤解しています！私は聖裁判所には一切仕えません！」
languages.original_text: "Wait, you have misunderstood! I don't serve the Inquisition at all!"

traits.locale_text: 「待ってください、あなたは誤解しています！私は聖裁判所には一切仕えません！」
